project.name: AI Teaching Assistant
project.description: Hệ thống tạo bài giảng tự động sử dụng AI (Gemini, Imagen, TTS) để generate PPTX, handouts, và quizzes từ outline

cliproxy.description: OpenAI-compatible proxy for free AI tier access
cliproxy.admin_config: system_configs table (cliproxy.enabled, cliproxy.url, cliproxy.apiKey, cliproxy.defaultTextModel, cliproxy.defaultImageModel)

tts: ViTTS (Local/Self-hosted Vietnamese TTS with voice cloning)

tables.name: slides
tables.description: Structured slide data (NEW - replaces slideScript TEXT)

tables.name: slide_audios
tables.description: Audio per slide (DEPRECATED - merged into slides)

tables.name: interactive_questions
tables.description: MC/MR questions for focus checking during lesson (NEW)

tables.name: api_keys
tables.description: Encrypted API keys for AI services

tables.name: model_configs
tables.description: User AI model preferences per task (TaskType: OUTLINE, SLIDES, SPEAKER_NOTES, QUESTIONS, IMAGE, TTS)

slides: GET /lessons/:id/slides - ⭐ Returns Slide[] entities (Step 5 data persistence)
pptx: GET /lessons/:id/pptx/generate-images - SSE stream for image generation
user_templates: GET /user/templates - Get user's personal PPTX templates
POST /user/templates/upload - Upload a personal PPTX template
prompts: GET /prompts/active/:slug - Get active prompt by slug

prompt_composer.buildFullPrompt(subjectId, slug, vars): Role (from Subject) + Task (from DB) - used for outline, slides, questions
prompt_composer.buildTaskOnlyPrompt(slug, vars): Task prompt only - used for slides.design, slides.image

features.name: Lesson Workflow (6 steps)
features.description: All 6 steps working with DB prompts and PromptComposer integration

features.name: AI Model Configuration
features.description: Dynamic model discovery: Gemini API list + CLIProxy all models (GPT/Claude/etc). User can select per task. TaskTypes: OUTLINE, SLIDES, SPEAKER_NOTES, QUESTIONS, IMAGE, TTS.

features.name: Structured Slides
features.description: SlideDataModule with parser, CRUD API, auto-parse after Gemini generation

features.name: Interactive Questions
features.description: MC/MR questions using questions.interactive prompt from DB via PromptComposer

features.name: Review Questions (Bloom)
features.description: 3-level taxonomy: Biết, Hiểu, Vận dụng - uses questions.review prompt from DB

features.name: Prompt System
features.description: Database-driven prompts with seedV2() sync. PromptComposer combines Role + Task prompts.

features.name: Lesson Management
features.description: Edit (rename) and delete lessons with confirmation modals. Delete cascades to slides, audio, questions.

features.name: Speaker Notes Model Selection
features.description: SPEAKER_NOTES task type added to TaskType enum, ModelConfigService, and frontend ModelSelector. Users can select independent AI model for speaker note generation in Step 4.

features.name: Interactive Question Answer Editing
features.description: Edit button in Step 6 now allows modifying answer text (not just question text). Answers sent to backend via PUT with answers[] array.

features.name: Admin Prompt Editor UI
features.description: Widened prompt edit modal (50vw), monospace font for content textarea. Uses .prompt-modal class to override UserSettings.css conflicts.

interactive_question.purpose: Kiểm tra tập trung trong suốt bài giảng
interactive_question.answers: Tối đa 10, đáp án đúng có dấu *
interactive_question.export_format: 11 cột (Question Type, Text, Answer 1-6, Correct Feedback, Incorrect Feedback, Points)

review_question.purpose: Ôn tập cuối bài theo Bloom taxonomy
review_question.export_format: 7 cột (Question ID, Question, Correct Answer (A), Option B, Option C, Option D, Explanation)
review_question.ui_note: Mức độ column removed from both UI table and Excel export

patterns: React Context for lesson editor state
⭐ PromptComposer: Role (system.role + Subject) + Task (from DB slug)
⭐ seedV2() in prompts.service.ts keeps DB and code in sync
gotchas: Gemini output format: **Slide N: Title** with **[Speaker Notes]:**
Prisma 7 requires typescript 5.5+
SlideAudio table deprecated - use Slide.audioUrl instead
TTSResult uses .audio (not .buffer) and .durationMs
FileStorageService path: datauser/{userId}/lessons/{lessonId}/audio/
JWT returns {id, email, role} - use req.user.id NOT req.user.userId
API response handling: check if response.data is array or object
TypeScript decorator metadata: use 'any' type for @Req() to avoid TS1272 error
⭐ Image model name: 'gemini-2.5-flash-image' NOT 'gemini-2.5-flash-preview-image-generation' (404 error)
⭐ Image SDK: Use @google/genai (new) NOT @google/generative-ai (legacy) for image generation
⭐ Image generation: Use client.models.generateContentStream() with config.responseModalities=['IMAGE','TEXT']
⭐ Browser tags cannot send JWT headers - use public route /files/public/... for images
⭐ Vite proxy: Add '/files' proxy to forward static file requests to backend port 3001
⭐ GEMINI_API_KEY must be in .env for image generation fallback when user has no key in DB
⭐ buildFullPrompt for questions (needs role) vs buildTaskOnlyPrompt for design/image (no role needed)
⭐ Prompt variables: {title}, {slide_script}, {detailed_outline}, {raw_outline}, {lesson_id}
⭐ Always sync prompts.service.ts seedV2() when updating prompts in DB to prevent data loss
⭐ ExcelJS import: Use 'import * as ExcelJS from exceljs' (static), NOT 'await import()' (dynamic fails)
⭐ InteractiveQuestion answers: DB has answer1-10 fields, backend transforms to answers[] array for frontend
⭐ Excel export: Use api.get() with responseType:'blob', create download link via URL.createObjectURL()
⭐ Step 5 API split: GET /slides returns Slide[] entities, GET /slides/script-data returns lesson metadata
⭐ Template background paths: URLs like /files/public/system/templates/{uuid}/... map to datauser/system/templates/{uuid}/...
⭐ getLocalPath() in pptx.service.ts: Must handle BOTH /templates/... AND /files/public/.../templates/... URL patterns
⭐ Template image UI: Needs dedicated routes in file-storage.controller.ts to serve background images for previews
⭐ ViTTS voice ID normalization: Strip 'vitts:' prefix before sending to API - voice format is 'ref:3', 'trained_xxx', or 'male'
⭐ ViTTS synthesize-with-saved-ref endpoint: Use form-urlencoded (URLSearchParams), NOT JSON body - API returns 422 with JSON
⭐ ViTTS multilingualMode: Optional param for handling mixed Vietnamese/English text - values: 'auto', 'syllable', 'english'
⭐ ViTTS API response parsing: /saved-references and /trained-voices return arrays directly, NOT nested {data:[]} objects
🐳 Prisma 7 Docker: Requires Node 22+ (not 20), OpenSSL on Alpine, binaryTargets: ['native', 'linux-musl-openssl-3.0.x']
🐳 Prisma 7 Docker: Remove 'url' from schema.prisma datasource - must use prisma.config.ts
🐳 Prisma 7 Docker: Create dummy .env with DATABASE_URL during build for prisma generate
🐳 NestJS Dockerfile: CMD uses 'dist/src/main' NOT 'dist/main' - check TypeScript output path
🐳 Docker Compose: ports: '3001:3001' REQUIRED to expose backend - different from PORT env var in container
🐳 Vite production: VITE_API_URL baked at BUILD time - use nginx proxy /api/ for runtime flexibility
🐳 Frontend nginx proxy: Add location /api/ { proxy_pass http://backend:3001/; } for API routing
🐳 Watchtower: Fails on older Docker (API version 1.25 vs 1.44) - remove and use manual docker compose pull
🚀 GHCR login: echo 'PAT_TOKEN' | docker login ghcr.io -u username --password-stdin
🚀 GitHub Actions: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}/project/service:branch format for image tags
⭐ refreshLessonDataOnly(): Refresh lesson data WITHOUT overwriting currentStep - prevents navigation resets when Step 3+ calls refresh
⭐ CSS class scoping: .delete-btn in Subjects.css uses position:absolute (for subject cards). Must scope with .subject-card .delete-btn to avoid overriding lesson card .delete-btn
⭐ Model Discovery (CLIProxy): Default-include ALL models for text tasks. Only skip embedding/moderation. Old code filtered by keyword (flash/pro/gemini/claude) which excluded GPT models

⭐ Model Discovery (Gemini): Use fetch() to https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models?key=... to dynamically list models. Merge with KNOWN_GEMINI_MODELS for display names. Fallback to static list if API fails
⭐ Review Question Prompt: Must explicitly prohibit citation phrases like 'Theo bài giảng', 'Trong bài học' etc. Add negative constraints in prompt for LLM compliance
⭐ CSS class conflict: UserSettings.css defines .modal-content {max-width:420px} which overrides AdminPage.css. Solution: Add specific class (.prompt-modal) with !important
⭐ Speaker notes prompt: Avoid rhetorical questions in examples (ĐÚNG section). Use declarative transition sentences instead
⭐ Interactive question editing: answers[] array uses * prefix for correct answers. When editing, preserve prefix. Send full answers array in PUT request
⭐ Excel export filename: Use Content-Disposition header on backend + link.setAttribute('download') on frontend for custom filenames
conventions: Prisma map() for snake_case in DB
Frontend pages in src/pages/, components in src/components/

prompt_slugs.system.role: Vai trò giảng viên - được kết hợp với Subject fields
prompt_slugs.outline.detailed: Step 2 - Tạo dàn bài chi tiết từ raw outline (JSON với learningGuide, situation, sections, reviewQuestions)
prompt_slugs.slides.script: Step 3 - Tạo kịch bản slide (20-30 slides, slideIndex từ 1)
prompt_slugs.slides.speaker-notes: Step 4 - Tạo lời giảng tự nhiên cho từng slide (Hook→Explain→Bridge, TTS-optimized)
prompt_slugs.slides.design: Step 5 - Tối ưu content (2-5 bullets, emoji học thuật, description ≤12 từ)
prompt_slugs.slides.image: Step 5 - Tạo prompt cho Imagen (educational illustration style)
prompt_slugs.questions.interactive: Step 6 - 5 câu hỏi kiểm tra tập trung (MC/MR)

slides.script.slide_count: 20-30 slides (1 title + 1 agenda + 1 objectives + 15-18 content + 1 questions + 1 summary)
speakerNote_rules: Không viết từ 'Hook', 'Explain', 'Bridge' vào nội dung
Dùng ngôn ngữ NÓI tự nhiên (Nào, À, Nha, Đúng không)
Xưng hô: 'các em' cho sinh viên đại học

slides.design.golden_rule: Định nghĩa/khái niệm → giữ nguyên văn, emoji + point để trống
